themes.reasoning_notes: Unblockable body pressures players reliably; ingest gives incidental exile value while fitting evasive, board-stalling tempo shells.
Ingest exiles from the top on combat damage, a library-pressure effect adjacent to mill, though it exiles instead of mills.
Eldrazi Drone typing can matter in Eldrazi-focused decks, but the card is more defined by unblockable ingest play patterns.
Unblockable is explicit and reliable; the card's main deckbuilding value is guaranteed player combat damage for ingest or other hit triggers.
Devoid makes it colorless, so it can count for colorless-matters payoffs, but that is secondary to its unblockable body.
